question: How fast do priority enterprise support tickets get a first response?
expected_answer_notes: Answer should mention one hour during business hours.

retrieved_docs.title: Customer Support SLA
retrieved_docs.text: Priority enterprise tickets receive a first response within one hour during business hours. Standard tickets receive a first response within eight business hours. Bug reports linked to production outages are escalated immediately to engineering.

retrieved_docs.title: Expense Reimbursement Rules
retrieved_docs.text: Meals under 40 USD do not require pre-approval. Hotel bookings above 180 USD per night require director approval unless travel occurs during a peak event period. Expense claims must include receipts and be submitted within 30 days of purchase.

retrieved_docs.title: Data Retention Policy
retrieved_docs.text: Application logs are retained for 90 days. Support chat transcripts are retained for 12 months. Deleted customer files remain in backup snapshots for up to 30 days before permanent removal.

final_prompt:
You are a concise QA assistant for eval exercises. Answer only from the retrieved context. If the context does not support the answer, say that clearly.
Retrieved context:
- [doc-006] Customer Support SLA (support): Priority enterprise tickets receive a first response within one hour during business hours. Standard tickets receive a first response within eight business hours. Bug reports linked to production outages are escalated immediately to engineering.
- [doc-003] Expense Reimbursement Rules (finance): Meals under 40 USD do not require pre-approval. Hotel bookings above 180 USD per night require director approval unless travel occurs during a peak event period. Expense claims must include receipts and be submitted within 30 days of purchase.
- [doc-008] Data Retention Policy (security): Application logs are retained for 90 days. Support chat transcripts are retained for 12 months. Deleted customer files remain in backup snapshots for up to 30 days before permanent removal.
Question: How fast do priority enterprise support tickets get a first response?
Answer:
answer: Priority enterprise support tickets receive a first response **within one hour during business hours**.
